evaluators.name: Save 3 popular under-$10k budget articles from last 12 months to reading list
evaluators.description: Checks that the user saved at least 3 of the most popular budget_money articles with overall_budget_max ≤ $10,000 and published within the last 12 months to their reading list.

evaluators.name: Save summer 8-hour outdoor 4 PM timeline (50–150 guests) to planning board
evaluators.description: Checks that the user has at least one planning board item for a summer, outdoor ceremony & reception timeline template with 8-hour length, 4:00 PM ceremony, and a 50–150 guest range.

evaluators.name: Create moodboard with 4 sage-and-gold neutral palettes
evaluators.description: Checks that there is a moodboard containing at least 4 color palettes tagged with both 'Sage Green' and 'Gold' and with palette_type 'includes_neutrals'.

evaluators.name: Save a ~150 guest barn/ballroom venue guide with backup indoor space
evaluators.description: Checks that the reading list includes at least one venues article for around 150 guests that has barn or hotel ballroom style and explicitly has a backup indoor space.

evaluators.name: Save a mixed round/long seating layout for 100–150 guests
evaluators.description: Checks that the planning board contains at least one seating layout template for 100–150 guests that uses mixed round and long tables.

evaluators.name: Generate 6-month under-$15k checklist and add first 5 'This Month' tasks to to-dos
evaluators.description: Checks that the first 5 checklist tasks from the 'This Month' section of a 6-month, under-$15,000, 80–120 guest checklist template have been added as todos.

evaluators.name: Add a qualifying catering budget breakdown article to budget planner under catering
evaluators.description: Checks that at least one food & drink budget breakdown article with per-guest catering cost ≤ $60 (and within the $40–$60 per-guest range when specified) has been linked under the Catering budget category.

evaluators.name: Save 3 beginner DIY decor projects under 2 hours and under $100
evaluators.description: Checks that at least 3 saved DIY projects are beginner level, require ≤120 minutes, and cost < $100.
